senses.gloss: verbal noun of زَهَا (zahā) (form I); bloom, florescence
verbal noun of زَهَا (zahā) (form I); date which begins to redden and ripen

examples.text: نَهَى رَسُولُ ٱللّٰهِ صَلَّى ٱللّٰهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ عَنِ الدُّبَّاءِ وَٱلْحَنْتَمِ وَٱلْمُزَفَّتِ وَٱلنَّقِيرِ وَأَنْ يُخْلَطَ الْبَلَحُ بِالزَّهْوِ.
examples.english: The prophet (PBUH) forbade [the preparation of wine in] a bottle-gourd, in a colocynth container, in a varnished jar, a hollow stump, and from mixing up ripe dates with nearly ripe dates.

senses.gloss: verbal noun of زَهَا (zahā) (form I); splendor
verbal noun of زَهَا (zahā) (form I); beauty
verbal noun of زَهَا (zahā) (form I); pride
verbal noun of زَهَا (zahā) (form I); haughtiness, arrogance, conceit
